title: Star Wars Journal: Anakin Skywalker
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:AnakinJournal.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Journal:
Anakin Skywalker'' |author=[[Todd Strasser]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[May]] [[1999]]''[[Star Wars Journal: Anakin Skywalker]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages=112 |isbn=9780590520935 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=[[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |series=''[[Star Wars Journal]]'' |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars Journal: Anakin Skywalker''''', alternatively titled '''''Episode I Journal: Anakin Skywalker''''', is a [[Star Wars Legends|Legends]] middle-grade novel written by [[Todd Strasser]]. It is part of the ''[[Star Wars Journal]]'' series, and it was published in paperback by [[Scholastic]] in [[May]] [[1999]]. It is presented as an [[in-universe]] journal written by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], and it recounts the events of the film [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'']]. ==Publisher's summary== ''I am a nine-year-old slave on the planet of Tatooine. I am owned by a creature named Watto. There's no way to escape.'' ''Then one day a Jedi appears. He says I am to be a Jedi, too. But first I must prove myself.'' ''First I must survive.'' ''My name is Anakin Skywalker. This is my story.'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot}} ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Journal: Anakin Skywalker}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|9780590520935}}; [[May 3]], [[1999]]; [[Scholastic]]; US paperback ===Cover gallery=== File:AnakinJournal.jpg|US paperback File:AnakinJournal_Pl.jpg|Polish-language edition ==Appearances== {{IncompleteApp}} {{App |characters= *[[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] *[[Kitster Chanchani Banai]] *[[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] {{Mo}} *[[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla Besadii the Elder]] {{Mo}} *[[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar Binks]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]] *[[Gasgano/Legends|Gasgano]] *[[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon Jinn]] *[[Jira/Legends|Jira]] *[[Habba Kee]] *[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] *[[Kam Nale|Elan Mak]] *[[Ody Mandrell/Legends|Ody Mandrell]] {{Mo}} *[[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] *[[Mawhonic/Legends|Mawhonic]] *[[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] *[[Obitoki]] *[[Ric Olié/Legends|Ric Olié]] *[[Darth Ruin/Legends|Darth Ruin]] {{Mo}} *[[Teemto Pagalies/Legends|Teemto Pagalies]] {{ID|Teemto Pugales}} *[[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] *[[Sabé/Legends|Sabé]] *[[Sebulba/Legends|Sebulba]] *[[Seek/Legends|Seek]] *[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] *[[Shmi Skywalker Lars/Legends|Shmi Skywalker]] *[[W.
